zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Corbet於1304年出生在英國武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特時，她的父親William Corbet24歲，母親Mrs-William Corbet19歲。她於1316年2月28日與John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1343年在英國瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Corbet于1304年出生在英国武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特时，她的父亲William Corbet24岁，母亲Mrs-William Corbet19岁。她于1316年2月28日与John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1343年在英国瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Corbet was born in 1304, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, her father, William Corbet, was 24 and her mother, Mrs-William Corbet, was 19. She married John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton on 28 February 1316, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1343, in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Corbet est née en 1304, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Corbet, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs-William Corbet, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton le 28 février 1316, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1343, à Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Corbet 1304 in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Corbet 24 und ihre Mutter Mrs-William Corbet 19. Sie hat am 28. Februar 1316 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1343 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Corbet è nata il nel 1304 nel Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, William Corbet, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mrs-William Corbet, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton il 28 febbraio 1316, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1343, nel Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Corbetが1304年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアチャッドエスリー コルベットで生まれた時，父William Corbetは24歳，母Mrs-William Corbetは19歳であった。1316年2月28日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでJohn de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1343年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストク カストルで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Corbet(이)가 1304년 영국 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Corbet(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs-William Corbet(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1316년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1343년 영국 워윅실르 맥스스토크 카스틀에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Corbet nasceu em 1304, em Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Corbet, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs-William Corbet, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton em 28 de fevereiro de 1316, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1343, em Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Corbet родилась в 1304 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Corbet было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs-William Corbet, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton 28 февраля 1316 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1343 г. в местности макссток кастл, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Corbet nació en 1304, en Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Corbet, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mrs-William Corbet, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John de Clinton, 2nd Lord Clinton el 28 de febrero de 1316, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1343, en Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
